title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 311.230 - Application for license to manufacture or sell made to supervisor
text:
311.230.  Application for license to manufacture or sell made to supervisor. — Application for license to manufacture or sell intoxicating liquor, under the provisions of this law, shall be made to the supervisor of liquor control.
(RSMo 1939 § 4896, A.L. 1967 p. 424)
